ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* AWS service that generated the event (e.g., ec2.amazonaws.com) */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., TerminateInstances) */,
  "aws_region" TEXT /* AWS region where the event occurred */,
  "source_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the source that generated the event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the source that generated the event */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code associated with the event (if any) */,
  "recipient_account_id" TEXT /* AWS account where the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Management, Data, Insight) */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., Security, Compliance) */,
  "request_parameters" TEXT /* Detailed request parameters */,
  "response_elements" TEXT /* Detailed response elements */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_category FOREIGN KEY ("event_category") REFERENCES event_categories ("event_category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_recipient_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_account_id") REFERENCES aws_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_aws_region FOREIGN KEY ("aws_region") REFERENCES aws_regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event associated with the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., AWS::EC2::Instance) */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., i-06232b1657282238d) */,
  "resource_status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., Active, Deleted) */,
  "resource_location" TEXT /* Location of the resource (e.g., us-east-1a) */,
  "resource_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_resources_resource_type FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_resources_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aws_accounts" (
  "account_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each AWS account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the AWS account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the AWS account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the AWS account (e.g., Active, Suspended) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of AWS account (e.g., Production, Development) */,
  "account_owners" TEXT /* List of owners for the account */,
  "account_contacts" TEXT /* List of contacts for the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Analyst) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "user_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  "user_preferences" TEXT /* Preferences of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Management, Data, Insight) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aws_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AWS region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the AWS region (e.g., us-east-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type (e.g., AWS::EC2::Instance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "console_logins" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each console login */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event associated with the console login */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the console login */,
  "source_ip_address" TEXT /* Source IP address of the console login */,
  "login_status" TEXT /* Status of the login (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of the login */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_console_logins_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_console_logins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_calls" (
  "api_call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API call */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event associated with the API call */,
  "api_name" TEXT /* Name of the API called */,
  "request_id" TEXT /* Request ID of the API call */,
  "api_status" TEXT /* Status of the API call (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "api_response_time" INTEGER /* Response time of the API call in milliseconds */,
  "api_error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the API call failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_calls_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "event_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event category */,
  "event_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the event category (e.g., Management, Data, Insight) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_category_id")
)
